name: Cinnamon Cake with Apple Cider Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: COUNTRY BAKING Preparation Time: 0:09 Heat oven to 350 degrees.
Grease and flour a 9x9x2-inch pan. Mix the flour, brown sugar, cinnamon, and salt in a large bowl. Cut in shortening using a pastry blender until the mixture is the size of small peas; reserve 1/3 cup. Beat in sour cream, baking soda, baking powder, and eggs until well blended. Spoon into pan and spread evenly. Sprinkle the reserved flour mixture over the batter. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool completely. Top each serving with ice cream and Apple cider sauce.
